name: nat_identifier
description: name of the nat track (if geog line) or id of the waypoint (if geog point)

name: nat
description: NAT track geo object for the given reporting time (either waypoint or track linestring)

name: flight_levels_west
description: list of integers for westbound flight levels for NAT track linestring

name: flight_levels_east
description: list of integers for eastbound flight levels for NAT track linestring

name: valid_dates
description: list of datetimes indicating valid range for NAT track linestring
